title: Where to Buy Gold in Kenya Safely: Trusted Sources and What to Look For
excerpt: For most international investors, buying physical gold from Kenya raises an immediate question: is this real? This guide covers where to buy gold in Kenya, what documentation to insist on, and how to tell a genuine mining company from an intermediary.
image: Blog Post Images/Buy Gold In Kenya - Article Featured Image.webp

title: How to Export Gold from Africa to Europe
excerpt: The process of exporting gold from Africa to Europe is more regulated than most buyers expect, and less complicated than most brokers suggest. This guide covers what documentation the African side requires, how European import regulations apply, and what to verify before agreeing to anything with a supplier.
